programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lecturer Maxine and paramedic team leader Cormac got married in the scenic northern region of the Dordogne in France, and now want Ben Hillman's help to find them their dream holiday home there. They have a budget of just over £100,000 and would ideally like a property with lots of outside space, just a short walk from the town of Riberac.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: Cameras follow The Jacobite steam train across the Glenfinnan Viaduct. Vloggers Geoff and Vicki, who have visited all 2,567 of Britain's railway stations, board the Caledonian Sleeper on a 24-hour return journey to the UK's highest station at Corrour. Plus, a team of engineers scramble to erect the UK's largest landslide barrier when a slip threatens a section of the world-famous West Highland Line

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express (2017)
programme.desc: An American businessman travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris tries to hire Hercule Poirot to be his bodyguard as he has had death threats made against him. The sleuth refuses, but wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow - and there is no shortage of suspects among the passengers. Agatha Christie mystery, directed by and starring Kenneth Branagh, with Daisy Ridley, Derek Jacobi and Johnny Depp

programme.title: The World's Most Famous Train
programme.desc: During its nine-month-long season, the Venice Simplon-Orient-Express makes over 60 journeys, covering 150,000 kilometres, with the majority of trips between London and Venice. The train is comprised of 17 unique 1920s carriages that have transported a host of elite individuals across Italy, Switzerland, and Turkey for more than a century. This documentary follows the stories of the staff and passengers as the train makes its way across Europe, with some customers having paid more than £2,000 for the privilege

programme.title: The Unremembered - Britain's Forgotten War Heroes
programme.desc: A century ago, in the aftermath of the First World War, Britain established vast war cemeteries to honour each individual who died serving the nation. The Commonwealth War Graves Commission set up to run them became famous for its principle of equality in death for everyone, regardless of the military rank or their role in civilian life. David Lammy journeys across Kenya and Tanzania to find out why many African soldiers and porters were overlooked during the conflict, and their names forgotten. He also looks at the impact this has on modern Africa and its communities today, and why he believes Britain has to put this right

programme.title: I Am Not a Witch (2017)
programme.desc: In a rural Zambian village, Shula, a taciturn, serious-looking pre-teen girl, is accused of witchcraft on the shaky basis that strange things have happened since she turned up out of the blue. But when Shula refuses to confirm or deny whether she's a witch, police officer Josephine contacts government official Mr Banda, who agrees to take care of her. Drama, starring Maggie Mulubwa and Nellie Munamonga. In Nyanja, Bemba and Tonga with English subtitles

programme.title: The Write Offs
programme.desc: Part two of two. programme.title: Generation Porn
programme.desc: Documentary examining the rise of free pornography since the mid-2000s, meeting viewers, stars and producers to ask what impact the increased accessibility is having on society. Cameras follow 19-year-old Gia and her room-mate Gianna, 21, who are both newcomers to the industry and are part of a generation of people that have grown up with porn at their fingertips - a reality at odds with their parents - which has led to problems for both young women. The programme also hears from British parents and their children, who are having frank, awkward and often funny discussions about their opinions and experiences of porn

programme.desc: Famous parents of black and mixed race children share their personal stories of making them aware of racism, and being given similar lessons by their own parents. Tinie Tempah, Emeli Sandé, Leigh-Anne Pinnock, Lennie James, Maro Itoje and Ade Adepitan are among the contributors discussing being on both sides of this commonplace exchange, and how they dealt with subjects like being seen as different or dealing with the police

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Oxford-based office administrator Aimee isn't sure that true love exists, having experienced her parents and many of their friends get divorced. The 22-year-old is hesitant about opening herself up to potential heartbreak, but now she's finally built up the courage to roll the dice and find out. She picks structural engineer Samuel, rapper Raquan, entrepreneur Max, recruitment specialist Oli and muscle man Abz to move in with her for the week in a bid to spark an enduring, romantic connection with one of them

programme.title: A Country Life for Half the Price with Kate Humble
programme.desc: Kate meets people who have started self-sufficient new lives in the country. The first episode features the Cook family from Exeter, who plan to move to the other end of the country and make a fresh start in the Shetland Islands. They plan to fund their new lifestyle through AirBnB and an isolated space for authors, but their move is complicated by a serious illness in the family

programme.title: A Country Life for Half the Price with Kate Humble
programme.desc: Kate meets the Goldby family from Epsom, where Vicki, Phil and their nine children have outgrown their four-bedroom house - which has only one bathroom. They have found a farmhouse with three bathrooms and scope for seven bedrooms, as well as more than two acres of land

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ships
programme.desc: This behind-the-scenes look at life on board the Seven Seas Explorer features head sommelier Georgiana, as the vessel prepares for a special visit to Bordeaux. Cameras go below deck and take a peek at the unique connoisseur drinks cellar with its £3,000 bottle of cognac and observes members of the night crew as they work to get the ship looking as good as new for the morning

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: The comedian explores the Kingdom of Fife and the East, starting at Falkland Palace - a former retreat of Scottish royalty. Once a hunting lodge to eight Stuart monarchs, it is the final resting place of King James V. Susan also visits Wemyss Caves, home to the largest collection of Pictish carvings in the world, and is invited into a little-known cave whose location must remain secret. Later, she is surprised to find a Japanese garden hidden deep in the countryside and gets the chance to bat for the world's only beach cricket club on Elie beach

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James is appointed as attending vet at the Darrowby Show - but Siegfried and Tristan warn him that the job is a poisoned chalice and expect him to quit after the first day. Mrs Hall has more faith in him, however, and makes a wager with the Farnon brothers. James finds himself surrounded by pushy farmers offering bribes to help them cheat their way to victory and faces a dilemma when the Aldersons desperately need his help in securing the sale of their prize bull

programme.title: Agatha & The Curse of Ishtar (2019)
programme.desc: Young writer Agatha Christie, bruised from her divorce and struggling with fame and success, travels to Baghdad, only to be caught in a web of murder and intrigue. She finds herself mired in the decadent core of the ex-pat community, where rival archaeologists, spoiled funders, bored partners, the downtrodden support staff and the upper-class all co-exist in a hotbed of rumour, feud and scandal. Lyndsey Marshal stars in an alternative history period drama, set in the winter of 1928

programme.title: Our Valley Family
programme.desc: Sisters Shania and Nikita battle it out in a bid to be the first to pass their driving test - spurred on by their mum's promise that the winner gets a car. Dado is encouraged to get to grips with his first smartphone and, after some intense tuition, he attempts to set up a fan site for Poppy the dog on Instagram - with mixed results

programme.title: OAPs Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Documentary following British pensioners growing old disgracefully in Benidorm. One couple attend a swingers club for ex-pats and locals. But with the 124-strong guest list ranging in age from 24 to the mid-70s, will the party be a success? Meanwhile, entrepreneur Lee prepares to dazzle the crowds at his Rocket Rabbi stunt show and it is make or break for granny rapper Janie B when she attends an audition - only for a bout of food poisoning to jeopardise her chances

programme.title: Big Body Squad

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow charts the life of Greek artist Domenicos Theotocopolous, dubbed El Greco, one of the most distinctive painters of the 16th century. His work was considered to be ahead of its time - so much so that it was all but ignored for 300 years. El Greco developed a highly individualistic style that eventually proved enormously influential, paving the way for the Baroque and providing the inspiration for 20th-century expressionism

programme.title: Good Dog, Bad Dog: Inside the World of Doggy Day Care
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at Bruce's Doggy Day Care in Surrey and Dogs Country Club in Warrington to find out what our four-legged friends get up to. A potential new pupil, Minnie the rottweiler, arrives in Warrington, but before she can be offered a place, she needs to have her behaviour assessed. Daycare boss David calls on the assistance of his right-hand dog, Zeus the Siberian husky, to help with the assessment. Zeus can spot an anti-social dog within minutes - so will Minnie pass the test?

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter tries to save a lamb that was badly injured during birth. A rottweiler locates a bag of class A drugs - but his owner is more concerned that he has eaten another bag. Anne discovers that wearing glasses can create problems for a vet, a one-week llama takes a turn for the worst, and a difficult birth leaves a cow struggling to feed its calf

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James' workload doubles when Siegfried takes ill during a harsh winter. Among his many patients is Dick Rudd's prized cow, which has an abscess in its throat and is on the brink of choking to death. Dick is devastated, having risked everything on the animal, leaving James determined to save the animal by any means. Mrs Hall discovers it is James' birthday, and Tristan tries his best to cheer him up by arranging a double date

programme.title: Queen Mary: How She Saved the Royals
programme.desc: Documentary about Elizabeth II's grandmother, who as Queen Consort was George V's most trusted adviser and became a symbol of national stability, particularly during the crisis that ensued when her eldest son Edward VIII abdicated. The programme examines her background prior to marriage and her continuing influence on the modern-day House of Windsor, with royal experts and historians revealing how Queen Mary's devotion to her duty and her country always came before her personal emotions

programme.title: All the Queen's Jewellery: Heirlooms & Legacy
programme.desc: The secrets and scandals related to royal jewellery, from Diana, Princess of Wales' divorce ring to the cursed tiara that ended the lives of most who wore it. The programme also reveals how everything from the stones to the settings has significance - be it a political power play, a family heirloom or a national treasure

programme.title: OAPs Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Documentary following British pensioners growing old disgracefully in Benidorm. One couple attend a swingers club for ex-pats and locals. But with the 124-strong guest list ranging in age from 24 to the mid-70s, will the party be a success? Meanwhile, entrepreneur Lee prepares to dazzle the crowds at his Rocket Rabbi stunt show and it is make or break for granny rapper Janie B when she attends an audition - only for a bout of food poisoning to jeopardise her chances

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Our Dream Hotel
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi lends her expertise to British expats Mark and Shirley, who have spent the past eight years living and working on the southern coast of Spain. A weekend break to a traditional Spanish cave house has inspired the pair to open their own. Setting their sights on a hillside in Granada, the duo plan to use their 25,000-euro savings and a £50,000 inheritance to set up a three-bedroom B&B, but an ambitious 10-week turnaround period could leave them struggling to open the doors on time

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor and presenter visits Durham cathedral, one of Britain's first Unesco World Heritage sites and a leading tourist attraction. The cathedral is over 900 years old and built like a fortress. It is 218ft tall and when first constructed was the country's tallest building. The bishops at Durham were so powerful that they were given the title Prince-Bishop to reflect their huge wealth and influence. As well as exploring the Norman edifice, Tony meets a modern-day treasure hunter who has discovered hidden lost treasures from the cathedral in the River Wear

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of dedicated volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow explores the life and work of ground-breaking artist Diego de Silva y Velazquez, whose paintings provide an insight into the development of the Spanish monarchy in the 17th century - and the decline of the most powerful royal court in Europe

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice and the team visit south London and get to work on a Clapham basement flat that lacks appeal, and ensure it meets the £200,000 asking price. Out go the orange and turquoise walls, painted over with soothing creams and lilac, while tatty rugs are replaced by smart laminate flooring

programme.title: Over the Hedge (2006)
programme.desc: A raccoon trickster is fretting about his debt to a fearsome bear when he stumbles on some animals waking in the woods after their winter nap. Spotting the chance to solve his problem, the raccoon dupes the gullible creatures into stealing food from a nearby suburb so he can give it to the bear - but they fail to realise they will soon be at the mercy of a vermin exterminator. Animated comedy, with the voices of Bruce Willis, Steve Carell, Garry Shandling and William Shatner

programme.title: Anna and the King (1999)
programme.desc: A widowed schoolmistress leaves Victorian England to tutor a son of the King of Siam, only to discover his majesty actually expects her to care for all 58 of his children. In spite of disagreements and many ups and downs, the teacher gradually forms a deep platonic love for her royal employer. Period drama, starring Jodie Foster, Chow Yun-Fat, Ling Bai, Syed Alwi, Tom Felton and Randall Duk Kim

programme.title: Tora! Tora! Tora! (1970)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama recounting the bombing of Pearl Harbour from both the Japanese and American perspectives, reconstructing the events leading up to the devastating attack on the US naval base in 1941. Starring Martin Balsam, So Yamamura, Joseph Cotten, James Whitmore and Jason Robards

programme.title: Sahara (2005)
programme.desc: An explorer stumbles upon evidence that an American Civil War battleship, which was laden with treasure when it sank without trace, has ended up somewhere in the Sahara. However, he is deflected from his mercenary quest to find the hoard by an encounter with a tenacious doctor, whose battle to stop the spread of a deadly disease could be linked to his own mission. Adventure, starring Matthew McConaughey, Penelope Cruz and Steve Zahn

programme.title: War of the Planet of the Apes Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Matt Reeves and star Andy Serkis talk about making the third film in the series

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes (2017)
programme.desc: A devastating conflict erupts between humans and intelligent primates in a post-apocalyptic future. The leader of the apes is determined to make peace and prove his people are not savages - but a tragic course of events leaves him wrestling with a desire for revenge. Sci-fi adventure sequel, the conclusion of the trilogy of prequels to the 1968 movie. Starring Andy Serkis, Woody Harrelson and Steve Zahn

programme.title: Filth (2013)
programme.desc: A corrupt policeman with a cocaine habit plans to advance his own career by turning colleagues against each other, while also desperately hoping to persuade his ex-wife to take him back. He rapidly loses his grip on reality as the drug use spirals out of control and his web of lies grows increasingly complex. Black comedy, starring James McAvoy, Imogen Poots, Jamie Bell and Jim Broadbent

programme.title: Jallikattu (2019)
programme.desc: A buffalo escapes from the slaughterhouse and wreaks havoc in a remote village in Kerala. Bedlam follows as the entire village decides to join in hunting down the animal, and during the wildly chaotic chase, many unresolved differences come to the surface, turning friends into foes. Indian crime drama, starring Antony Varghese and Chemban Vinod Jose. In Malayalam

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: ...in Lockdown. Sitcom about two grumpy old Deaf men. When Tim is forced to stay at home for three months, his friend Angus uses video chat to offer support. Starring John Smith and Matt Kirby.

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre (1965)
programme.desc: A corrupt senator coaxes Colonel Custer out of retirement with the prospect of presidential office, and the soldier tries to further his political ambitions by wresting control of the current military campaign from its commanding officer, culminating in his last stand at the Battle of the Little Bighorn. Western, with Philip Carey, Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin and Julie Sommars

programme.title: Hell Below Zero (1954)
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking explorer joins a whaling ship and is persuaded by the female captain to investigate the disappearance of her father on an earlier expedition. The pair become suspicious of her former lover - and are proved right when he leaves them for dead in Antarctic waters. Action adventure, starring Alan Ladd, Joan Tetzel, Basil Sydney and Stanley Baker

programme.title: The Turning Point (1952)
programme.desc: A journalist helps a crusading district attorney who has been given the task of cracking down on a crime syndicate, but the pair's efforts are hampered by political corruption. Film noir, starring William Holden, Edmond O'Brien and Alexis Smith

programme.title: Houseboat (1958)
programme.desc: An Italian socialite rebels against her domineering father and gets a job as a maid for a widowed father. While helping her employer learn to understand his three precocious children, she also falls in love with him and must decide whether or not to reveal her secret. Romantic comedy, starring Cary Grant and Sophia Loren

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters (2013)
programme.desc: The modern-day teenage son of the Greek god Poseidon must lead his friends on a perilous journey into the Bermuda triangle. They need to recover the legendary Golden Fleece to save the world, but getting to it means braving all manner of terrifying monsters. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Logan Lerman and Alexandra Daddario

programme.title: Three Billboards Interview Special
programme.desc: Writer-director Martin McDonagh and star Sam Rockwell talk about making the dramatic comedy about revenge and redemption in small-town America

programme.title: The Festival (2018)
programme.desc: When Nick's girlfriend dumps him at graduation, he has a colossal meltdown in front of the entire university. He's convinced his life is over, but his best mate Shane has the perfect solution - three days at a music festival. With the help of 'festival aficionado' and certified oddball Amy, Shane tries to get Nick to embrace the music, the mayhem and the mud. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas, Hannah Tointon, Hammed Animashaun and Jemaine Clement

programme.title: The Business (2005)
programme.desc: A criminal flees London in the 1980s to start a new life on the Costa del Sol. He is soon drawn into the inner circle of a British gangster living in exile, but his relationship with a psychotic crook's girlfriend threatens to bring his criminal career to an abrupt end. Crime drama, starring Danny Dyer, Tamer Hassan and Geoff Bell

programme.title: Dracula Untold (2014)
programme.desc: A Romanian knight fights to defend his homeland against Turkish invaders. Faced with overwhelming odds, he enters into a dangerous bargain to gain supernatural powers so he can drive off his enemies - but the deal could cost him his humanity as he transforms into a terrifying monster. Fantasy adventure, starring Luke Evans, Dominic Cooper and Charles Dance

programme.title: My Life as a Courgette (2016)
programme.desc: After losing his mother, a young boy is sent to a foster home with other orphans his age, where he begins to learn the meaning of trust and true love. Animation, with the voices of Gaspard Schlatter, Sixtine Murat and Paulin Jaccoud

programme.title: The Far Horizons (1955)
programme.desc: In 1803, Meriwether Lewis and William Clark set out to chart the Louisiana Territory, with their trek taking them through the unknown the Pacific Northwest, guided by a Shoshone woman called Sacajawea. Western, starring Fred MacMurray, Charlton Heston, Donna Reed and Barbara Hale

programme.title: Comanche Station (1960)
programme.desc: A cowboy recruits a trio of outlaws to rescue a woman held captive at a Comanche camp and reunite her with her husband in return for a large reward. However, his partners decide the bounty should be split three ways rather than four and plan to double-cross him. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Nancy Gates, Claude Akins and Skip Homeier

programme.title: The Savage (1952)
programme.desc: A white man raised by the Sioux after his family were killed by Crow warriors finds his loyalties tested in later life. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Susan Morrow and Peter Hansen

programme.title: Destroyer (1943)
programme.desc: A former welder working on the Navy destroyer whose construction he oversaw angers his crewmates with his relentless quest for perfection. Wartime adventure, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford, Marguerite Chapman and Regis Toomey

programme.title: The Maze Runner (2014)
programme.desc: A teen arrives in an isolated community of youngsters, with no memory of who he is or the outside world. When another new arrival brings an ominous message, he realises time is running out for the group and they must find an escape route through a deadly labyrinth if they are to survive. Sci-fi adventure based on James Dashner's novel, starring Dylan O'Brien, Kaya Scodelario and Patricia Clarkson

programme.title: Star Trek (2009)
programme.desc: The trainee crew members of the starship Enterprise embark on their maiden flight, which pits them against a Romulan commander from the future who is planning a horrific revenge on those he blames for a tragedy in his own time. Sci-fi adventure based on the original TV series, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto, Eric Bana, Zoe Saldana and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Family (2013)
programme.desc: A gangster testifies against his partners in crime, before he and his family are relocated to rural France under the witness protection program. Despite their FBI handler's efforts to keep them under control, they soon return to their criminal ways - while the mobsters they betrayed are soon on their trail. Comedy thriller, with Robert De Niro, Michelle Pfeiffer and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Victor Frankenstein (2015)
programme.desc: A sideshow performer is taken in by a scientist, who seeks his help in performing experiments to create life, and hopefully uncover the secrets of immortality. The plan goes dangerously out of control, and it falls to the devoted assistant to save his master from his dark obsessions and his monstrous creation. Gothic horror, starring James McAvoy and Daniel Radcliffe

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: An outspoken schoolteacher who is very involved in the Latino community swaps lives with a conservative woman whose husband is a Trump supporter

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: While Barry's love of Animal House fails to impress an elite fraternity, Beverly tries convincing Murray to take up new hobbies

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica attempts to fool Beverly into thinking a parents weekend has been rescheduled. Meanwhile, Adam joins the school production of Romeo and Juliet

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After discovering The Rocky Horror Picture Show, Barry decides to throw a Halloween party for the ages, no matter what Erica says

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray buys WrestleMania tickets to spend time with Barry and Adam, only to find they are fakes and they cannot get in. Guest starring Hulk Hogan as himself

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Thanksgiving arrives at the Goldberg family home, Pop-Pop and Uncle Marvin each find a way to disrupt Beverly's carefully made plans

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle go on an eight-day stakeout, which puts a strain on their friendship. Meanwhile, Jeffords uses Santiago and Gina for inspiration when he writes a book about his daughters, and Captain Holt's nephew visits Brooklyn and makes an instant impression on Diaz. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Nick Cannon

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team visits Boyle's beach house on a detectives-only getaway, but Peralta ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt along. The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Though still heartbroken over Sophia, Jake's spirits are lifted when the squad is invited to a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training simulation. Gina performs a psychological test on Holt, while Santiago and Diaz compete for a day off

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta notices Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with the captain's husband Kevin to find out what has gone wrong. Boyle tries to get a confession out of an elderly bank-robbery suspect (played by Happy Days creator Garry Marshall), who pretends to be frail and adorable whenever Santiago and Diaz are around

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie (2004)
programme.desc: The plucky sea creature sets out to prove his boss Mr Krabs is innocent of stealing Neptune's crown. However, the missing item has ended up in sinister Shell City, which all sea-dwellers fear and from which few have ever returned. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny, Bill Fagerbakke, Clancy Brown and Scarlett Johansson, plus a cameo appearance by David Hasselhoff

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the comedy about scientists and their friendship with a down-to-earth neighbour. When aspiring actress Penny moves into Leonard's apartment block, he is immediately smitten, but Sheldon warns him that he runs the risk of a broken heart if he tries to woo her. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon helps Leonard drop off a parcel for Penny, but when he sees how messy her flat is, he tries to do a good deed - which is not well received. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is upset to learn Penny is dating someone, so his friends encourage him to seek a new romance by asking another woman out. Sara Gilbert appears alongside her Roseanne co-star Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is fired for being disrespectful to his boss, and explores new activities in a bid to find a purpose in life other than physics, but Leonard takes drastic action to restore him to his old self. Laurie Metcalf guest stars as Sheldon's mother

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard fears he is wasting his time with Penny and ends up spending the night with fellow scientist Leslie. However, he is disappointed when she later tells him she was only interested in a one-night stand. Meanwhile, Sheldon frets over a change to his hamburger routine. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Warcraft (2016)
programme.desc: A kingdom stands on the brink of war when it is invaded by a vast horde of creatures who have travelled through a portal from their dying world. As dark magic works its influence on the world, two leaders from either side are set on a collision course with each other as they strive to protect their people. Fantasy adventure based on the best-selling computer game, starring Travis Fimmel, Paula Patton and Ben Foster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Will, Simon and Neil find university life does not live up to their expectations, and are insanely jealous of Jay's stories of his gap year in Australia. Heading Down Under to meet their friend, they inevitably discover he has exaggerated his escapades - so decide to go in search of a real adventure. Comedy sequel, starring Simon Bird, James Buckley, Joe Thomas and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny hosts a Halloween costume party, which proves a worthy test for the boys' social skills. During the event, Leonard has a run-in with Penny's ex-boyfriend. Kaley Cuoco, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is forced to take Howard's place in the boys' video-game night while he is otherwise engaged with one of her friends. Simon Helberg, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki star

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Teaching assistant and burlesque performer Susie, 32, hopes to overcome her dating nerves and stutter to find her 'Prince Charming'. Her date is Star Trek fan Martin from Essex, while 30-year-old hairdresser Bonnie hopes semi-pro boxer Perry is the man for her. However, it remains to be seen if Cupid's arrow strikes any of them

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin shows up with new date Gael (singer Enrique Iglesias), prompting Ted to move on. While out on the town with Barney and Marshall, he meets fun-loving Amy (Mandy Moore). American comedy, starring Cobie Smulders and Josh Radnor

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney and Ted decide Gael's romantic successes are due to his foreign accent, and pretend to be overseas tourists to attract women. Meanwhile, Robin starts feeling stressed as soon as she returns from Argentina. Starring Neil Patrick Harris, Josh Radnor and Cobie Smulders

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay, and he is so put out that he spends the next few days trying to prove his worth to his son

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam accidentally invites Andi along on the guys' annual trip together, he must try to work out a way to un-invite her without making things worse. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Liza Snyder

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has to tackle a school project on the Second World War, so decides to make a film featuring his grandfather. However, Pops takes matters into his own hands when Adam finds all his war stories mundane. Erica fails to cope with her own cooking and laundry at college and returns home to confront Beverly for over-mothering her, but Murray insists that Beverly starts to teach Erica and Barry basic life skills

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly intervenes when she finds out that Coach Mellor has a strained relationship with his brother, Coach Nick, but when the two men face off in the gym, Adam and Barry join in. Meanwhile, Geoff and Erica struggle with their long-distance relationship

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt and Peralta contract mumps during an investigation, so the pair elect to be quarantined together in the hope that they can use the time to solve the case. Diaz tries to help Boyle through the mourning process for his dog, and Jeffords is forced to clean up Hitchcock and Scully's mess. Oscar Nunez guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago are excited to go on their first real holiday together, but their perfectly planned cruise ship itinerary is thwarted when they discover that an old adversary is on board. Boyle and Diaz vie for the same apartment, while Gina and Jeffords help Captain Holt to survive a visit from his sister Debbie

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The prodigy must find a new way to stay academically challenged without the university class run by Dr Sturgis. Pastor Jeff asks Mary to be his conscience when it comes to him starting up a new relationship. George calls Mary, while she is busy helping Pastor Jeff pick out clothes for a date

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Meemaw and Sheldon fall out when she refuses to take him to the lecture, so the youngster makes his own plans. Meanwhile, Georgie tries to impress Veronica with expensive jewellery after he starts selling candy at school. Iain Armitage and Montana Jordan star, with the voice of Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam discovers someone is sneaking his boat out at night, and assumes the culprits are Don and Joe. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don disagree about a new house to flip for their construction business. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is appalled when Geoff arranges for them to go out to dinner with her family to celebrate her birthday. Geoff soon discovers that dinner with the Goldbergs is no ordinary meal out: the family repeatedly change tables, Murray insists Adam order from the children's menu, the food is sent back to the kitchen, and Barry wants to amend his order but Beverly won't allow it. By the end of the evening, Geoff reaches breaking-point

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Murray fall out over Adam's plans to pursue a comedy career after his attempts to be funny in woodwork class nearly result in his teacher getting injured. Beverly and Geoff worry that college is turning Erica into a pretentious snob, but they allow Barry to coach them in the finer points of culture in an attempt to stay close to her

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After identifying the mob informant, Holt, Jake and Rosa make plans to infiltrate FBI headquarters to get the man's files, with the captain bringing in his former partner to help out. Guest starring Dennis Haysbert (24's President Palmer)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Officers at the precinct drop everything to intervene when they suspect that Captain Holt is in danger after their efforts to track down Adrian Pimento's hitman take an unexpected turn. Dennis Haysbert guest stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: George Sr is furious when Georgie tries to buy his way out of his household chores, while Sheldon learns to listen when an emotional Paige struggles with her parents' divorce

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: George Sr and Georgie go camping with Meemaw's new boyfriend Dale, but things get complicated when her ex-boyfriend Dr Sturgis tags along. Sheldon and Missy invent a new game

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Ashanti guest stars

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: The vampire worries he may be killing people in his sleep when a series of murders are identical to his dreams, and Kate finds one of Angelus's old calling cards at a crime scene

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's parents set him up on a blind date in the hope of initiating an arranged marriage, but after a promising start it becomes apparent that the girl in question is more interested in Sheldon. Meanwhile, Penny begins her new job as a bartender. Starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon receive an invitation to present their research to a physics conference, but Sheldon's reluctance to pander to his peers causes conflict between the friends. An intervention by Penny makes matters worse. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Animated US sitcom set in the world of Rick, a genius inventor and his less-than-genius grandson Morty. In the first episode, missing for nearly 20 years, drunken scientist Rick arrives on his daughter Beth's doorstep looking to move in, but her husband Jerry isn't too thrilled. Rick converts the garage into his laboratory and involves easily influenced grandson Morty in his insane misadventures, starting with a mission to another dimension to find the seeds to mega-trees

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted decides to tell his new girlfriend how he met his friends, but none of the various versions of events entirely add up. Sitcom, starring Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan, Jason Segel, Neil Patrick Harris and Cobie Smulders

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's stuck-up sister Kelly in her place when she comes for a visit. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi see how much Lowell's relationship with Kelly is changing him, they stage an intervention to get him to stop putting up with her behaviour

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides to reinvent herself by going to night school so that she can quit her substitute teacher role and own her own business, but Murray dislikes change and tries to convince her to take a different path. Meanwhile, Barry embarks on a makeover of his own, and Erica struggles to balance her academic studies with her social life in college and calls on Adam for assistance

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Jackie fall out over which Halloween costumes to wear, so Murray teaches Adam to agree mindlessly with everything his girlfriend says just to keep her happy. However, Murray's strategy soon backfires, causing issues in his relationship with Beverly. Meanwhile, as Lainey visits Erica at college, Barry aims to get back together with her

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. However, to prove his findings he must first win the trust of fellow scientist Barry Kripke to gain access to a powerful computer. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny runs into money troubles, so Sheldon offers to lend her some cash to help her pay the rent. However, when Leonard discovers his neighbour's ex-boyfriend Kurt is the cause of her financial woes, he gathers the gang for a confrontation. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: On his birthday, Peralta takes Santiago to meet his mother, but an unexpected appearance by his father spoils his special day. Diaz and Boyle struggle with a new mandate on body cams while on a stakeout with Jeffords, while Gina forgets to inform the precinct when Captain Holt comes up with an important plan. Katey Sagal and Bradley Whitford guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when a plumbing emergency forces staff from a neighbouring station to work temporarily from the Nine-Nine precinct, and Boyle becomes jealous of Peralta's old partner. Cop comedy, guest starring Damon Wayans Jr

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster tries to take his mind off a difficult science problem by reading The Lord of the Rings, but this just leads to a whole new obsession. Meanwhile, Missy asks George to teach her about baseball so she can impress a boy at school

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

However, following a few drinks, Sheldon and Amy's relationship takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Raj goes on a date with Lucy, who tries to sneak out of the restaurant's bathroom window - but ends up getting stuck and calling for his help

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam's mother-in-law makes an unexpected visit and reveals some shocking news. Guest starring Nancy Lenahan (Veep, Worst Week)

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi resort to their usual punishment in response to Teddy's bad grades

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry looks to secure a spot on the high school football team but is quickly consigned to the bench by Coach Mellor for his lack of sporting prowess. Adam decides to help his brother understand that there are other ways he can contribute to the squad's success

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam sets out to create a sequel to Raiders of the Lost Ark as he admires director Steven Spielberg so much that he has written an original script about Indiana Jones, but his passion for directing is challenged in the process. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of three. When crime boss Jimmy 'The Butcher' Figgis sees Peralta and Holt's viral video and comes looking for them, the duo begin their fight back, but things go awry and they end up on the wrong side of the interrogation table. Back at the precinct, a new captain takes over, but is he up to the job? Maya Rudolph and Ken Marino guest star

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard becomes concerned that Sheldon will overreact when his friend learns the truth about a past indiscretion, while Penny confronts Raj's old flame Lucy about the way she ended their relationship. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is dismayed when the group spends the Thanksgiving holiday at Mrs Wolowitz's house, but hits it off with Bernadette's father. Meanwhile, Penny realises she must deal with a mistake from her past when she and Leonard have an argument. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Beverly signs everyone up for a holiday family photo, Geoff is excited to join in, despite Erica's reservations. Barry must face the fact that he has not been a good friend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy adventure, written by and starring Paul Hogan, with Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Mark Blum

Meanwhile, model Jade wows her fellow daters as she walks into the restaurant, but can business owner Adam live up to this tall, blonde single mum's exacting standards for the whole evening?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore an Aston Martin DB6 for its owner, who has been prevented from working on it by a serious fall and chronic health problems

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a Renault 5 GT Turbo belonging to a man who was forced to abandon work on it after suffering serious organ failure

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-lover Kerry Bolwell-Williams kicks off a week of dinner parties in the Welsh valleys, where she hopes that a full choir and a simple menu will impress her guests and make her an early contender for the £1,000 prize. However, she does not react well when it is suggested that her home has a rather distinctive smell

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Food-lover and theme park fan Dave Morris hosts the second dinner party in the Welsh valleys, hoping his home-grown herbs, hand-picked fruit and complicated menu will win him the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Shop owner Tasnim Sardar hosts the third night of the competition in the Welsh valleys, and hopes her Pakistani-inspired party will secure her the £1,000 prize. Financial advisor Gill Leonard likes her curries to be hot and spicy, and is particularly pleased by Tasnim's curried cauliflower

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ryan Woodward hosts on the fourth night in the Welsh valleys and has put a lot of thought into his evening, but each of his courses goes wrong - from a bread blunder to a clam crisis. He hopes an Ibizan dance lesson and drinks served in his hot tub will help to turn the party around

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in the Welsh valleys, financial advisor Gill Leonard dons the oven gloves to entertain the other contestants, and there is a dramatic start to the evening thanks to a mock fire-breathing dragon. Later, the host makes a remarkable revelation to her shocked guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the 12th-century Oxenham Arms, Devon, where owners Simon and Lyn Powell hope to kick-off the competition in style. The guests participate in broom dancing and after throwing some moves, the hosts have fellow contestant John pegged as the one to watch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Elegant House bed and breakfast in Liverpool on their second night, where host John Brady hopes his unique property will stand out from the crowd. Nikki and David get to grips with the unconventional facilities, and David reveals his background as a hotel inspector - with Amanda making her opinions on the star rating system very clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to Monmouthshire, where Peter and Amanda Copp want to rope their guests into the world of 'glamping' at Hidden Valley Yurts. John has a hairy encounter in his yurt, and the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress David and Nikki. The next morning, the DIY breakfast proves underwhelming for some, while the hosts discover that the great outdoors is not everyone's cup of tea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former hotel inspector and owner David Stanbridge and manager Nikki Deans welcome the contestants to the Cley Hall Hotel in Spalding, Lincolnshire. Peter and Amanda are impressed by their room, but Simon and Lyn are unhappy with the state of the carpet. The next morning, the guests decide to put their eight-minute breakfast rule to the test, and some of them have concerns about Nikki's waitressing skills

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and confront their critics. Simon and Lyn kick off proceedings by demanding answers from John about his disturbed night's sleep, but then find themselves taken to task by David over their cleanliness feedback. However, the former hotel inspector receives his own interrogation from Peter and Amanda, who want to know why he didn't praise their shared bathroom facilities. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee teacher Kirsty Davenport kicks off a week of dinner parties in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where she hopes that a simple menu will impress her guests - property finder Ann-Marie Hamilton, sales consultant Russell Turnbull, part-time lecturer Adam Holt and hairdresser Becci Moloney

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ann-Marie Hamilton hosts day two in Eastbourne, where she plans to entertain her guests by singing in her garden. Fellow contestant Russell makes a lot of jokes, but foodie Adam does not seem amused

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Becci Moloney hosts the third dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, and prepares a menu of hearty food for her guests. Her outdoor bar makes a positive impression on rivals Kirsty and Ann-Marie, but Russell and Adam are puzzled by her collection of recycled toilets in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Adam Holt hosts the fourth dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where his fellow competitors' expectations are high. However, some of them are surprised by his menu - which fails to amount to much more than sausages and mashed potato

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Raconteur Russell Turnbull hosts the final night in Eastbourne, East Sussex. Having played his cards close to his chest all week with regards to his culinary skills, his plans for a fancy menu intrigue his rivals. However, for all the bravado, it remains to be seen whether he can actually cook

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud oversees the efforts of Jonathan Belsey, a scientist who is trying to build a carbon-neutral home for his partner and their four daughters. The design and construction are risky because they feature untested technology and an uncompromising choice of materials, and he soon finds the costs spiralling out of control

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: Humberside Search and Rescue rush to Thornwick Bay to help an injured man, and the Cairngorm Mountain Rescue team embarks on a night search to find a missing biker

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old motorcyclist Sam is airlifted to St George's after crashing into a bus and being thrown under a car. He is placed in an induced coma and CT scans reveal Sam has bruising to his lungs, a ruptured kidney, a broken thigh bone and a fractured spine. The priority of the medics is is to stop his internal bleeding, while Sam's parents are rushed to the hospital by police. Meanwhile, seven-year-old Raheem arrives in A&E with his dad Dennis after cutting his wrist while playing at home, and 59-year-old Therese turns up with a painful lump on her finger

programme.title: Inside Birmingham Children's Hospital
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on parents who go the extra mile to care for their children. They include Rob, who swapped life on the road as a long-haul trucker to become the primary carer to his four-year-old daughter Chelsea, who was born with a serious kidney disorder and has spent more than 200 nights of her life in hospital. Meanwhile, Shafak is bringing up four children by herself, including Eman, who also has a kidney condition, meaning more than a cupful of water a day could kill her. The seven-year-old is drinking more than her allowance - so Shafak must be a loving mother and disciplinarian at the same time

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: Humberside Search and Rescue rush to Thornwick Bay to help an injured man, and the Cairngorm Mountain Rescue team embarks on a night search to find a missing biker

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old motorcyclist Sam is airlifted to St George's after crashing into a bus and being thrown under a car. He is placed in an induced coma and CT scans reveal Sam has bruising to his lungs, a ruptured kidney, a broken thigh bone and a fractured spine. The priority of the medics is is to stop his internal bleeding, while Sam's parents are rushed to the hospital by police. Meanwhile, seven-year-old Raheem arrives in A&E with his dad Dennis after cutting his wrist while playing at home, and 59-year-old Therese turns up with a painful lump on her finger

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: A smooth-talking priest offers Ted a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to leave Craggy Island and run his own parish in Beverly Hills, but first he has to tell Jack, Dougal and Mrs Doyle that they are not invited. Final episode of the clerical comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, with Tommy Tiernan, Jeff Harding and a cameo appearance by music star Brian Eno

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp introduces new crafts, skills and techniques for interior decoration. In this edition, she reveals how to create a personalised vintage doormat and coasters, using spray paint, old tiles and serviettes

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Prison officer Cecil and foster carer Patricia have a budget of up to £180,000 and want to buy a holiday home in Vero Beach, Florida. Scarlette Douglas shows them a few options

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting Windsor to meet Pete and Phil, who rent out cars to the film and TV business. Henry finds an Austrian moped which is missing an engine, while Simon picks a fibreglass suit of armour

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo head for Crewe to meet rock and roller Billy, who lives in a house that is frozen in time in the 1950s

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Fresh from the success of hosting a three-day wedding at the chateau, Dick and Angel make business plans for the grounds, intending to charge people to fish in the moat and forage in the woods. Angel starts work on a second guest suite, but also wants to install an elevator, which pushes Dick's engineering skills to the limit

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Wiltshire to help first-time self-builders Vince and Jackie Macey create a super-sustainable, three-bedroom house. Electrician Vince has some firm ideas on how things should be done, but unexpected setbacks threaten to ruin things, as they struggle to sell their old house and face running out of cash

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another selection of B&B owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The contest begins at Dunsandles Guest House in New Brighton, Merseyside, where owner Alan Johnson and his professional sidekick Dave Owen hope to win the title - but a scandal with some unwanted hair on the bed sheets is not a good start, and two guests feel they are making an exhibition of themselves with a tea-trolley in full view of the neighbours

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the second day of the competition, the contestants visit the Lady Teal Hotel Boat on the waterways near Burnley in Lancashire, and owners Nick and Gina Mead hope to impress them with an afternoon of entertainment out on the locks. At breakfast, one of the guests admits to not enjoying his stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From York House in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, where Brock Bergius hopes that his cheeky sense of humour and perfectionist nature will help him win the competition. He is in his element making saucy jokes during an afternoon of sausage making, but his reluctance to stray from the menu at breakfast leaves some of his guests disappointed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Heyford House in Oxfordshire, where Leo and Sonya Brooke-Little hope to impress the contestants with their hospitality. The afternoon event is boxing, which Brock Burgius sees as the perfect opportunity to settle some scores with his fellow competitors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's winner is announced as the B&B owners meet for the last time to thrash out their differences. Feedback includes criticism of a badly positioned tea tray, controversy over a hot chocolate and accusations of overenthusiastic hosting

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester's Penguin Island is home to one of the most enduring love stories in the zoo. At 22, Rud is the oldest on the island, and has been with his partner, Spike, for over 15 years. However, keepers are concerned that Rud's arthritic hip could be affecting his quality of life. Meanwhile, the Sumatran tigers are upgrading to a luxury new enclosure on the other side of the zoo as part of Chester's huge expansion. But they've lived in their home for most of their lives so it's not going to be an easy move

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Lauren and Christian Grant in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, who are unsure whether to sell or upgrade their house. Christian dreams of a home bursting with character, but Lauren thinks that they can refurbish their four-bedroom detached property to make it more suitable for them and their two small children

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree await the arrival of their guests, who are expecting a luxurious Christmas at the chateau. Dick continues work on installing the lift, but the project tests his ingenuity to the limit, while Angel finds more valuables in the attic, including a collection of vinyl records

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows interior designer Kathryn Tyler as she tries to create a Scandinavian-style eco house in her mother's back garden in Falmouth, Cornwall, close by the Lizard Peninsula. The plan is ambitious, featuring a white-painted brick ground floor, a lightweight timber-frame first floor and cleverly designed spaces, but the small size of the plot and Kathryn's inexperience could hamper the project

programme.title: Inside the Spitfire Factory
programme.desc: The newly built fuselage is sent off to the paint shop, while owner Peter Monk travels to Normandy in a Second World War Jeep to celebrate the 80th anniversary of D-Day

programme.title: Guy Martin's Great Escape
programme.desc: Guy Martin wants to recreate the most iconic motorcycle stunt in movie history - the climax of the film The Great Escape, in which Steve McQueen's character Lieutenant Hilts steals a motorbike and attempts to jump two border fences into Switzerland. The original bike used in the film was a Triumph, and it's only right that Guy should convert and prep a modern Triumph Scrambler 1200 for his big stunt

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Surgeons must plan their next move carefully when Daisy, a 22-month-old girl, arrives at St George's Hospital by air ambulance after being kicked in the head by a horse at her family's stables. Meanwhile, 54-year-old Mike, who has a form of medication-resistant epilepsy, arrives in minors with a bandage around his jaw after falling face-first onto the pavement. Plus, 100-year-old Florence, who was diagnosed with dementia three years earlier, and her daughter Frances arrive at the hospital when the former suffers what appears to be a stroke

programme.title: Inside the Spitfire Factory
programme.desc: The newly built fuselage is sent off to the paint shop, while owner Peter Monk travels to Normandy in a Second World War Jeep to celebrate the 80th anniversary of D-Day

programme.title: Inside the Zoo: Down Under
programme.desc: Keepers prepare to move three giraffes to a new enclosure, while a feisty short-beaked echidna needs a medical check-up before it joins the other echidnas in the breeding pool

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another chance to see some of the programme's more memorable investigations, including Kate Quilton's investigation into saffron fraud in the Atlas Mountains, Morocco, Mark Tebbutt's exploration of how glace cherries are made and Jimmy Doherty's revelation into what pub grub favourite whitebait actually is

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Angela and Steve from Leicestershire search for a second home in Lanzarote that they can move to permanently after retirement, with a budget of £225,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet a woman whose family have raced cars for three generations, and Simon comes across an old ship's carpenter's chest he can restore

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Woking, where they find a sidecar to be transformed into a boat and a water cylinder that Simon might make a trendy lamp

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

Dick continues work on installing the lift, but the project tests his ingenuity to the limit, while Angel finds more valuables in the attic, including a collection of vinyl records

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Devon to help some turkey farmers who are desperate to finally put a proper roof over their kids' heads. After a decade living in makeshift accommodation, Daniel and Elaine Mason are building a family home on the family farm, but Charlie's worried the budget won't keep pace with their architectural ambition. The designs look complicated and costly, and when the first bills come in, his worst fears are realised

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Anglesey, where best pals Richard Tuke and Susan Hatch hope to show that Blackthorn Farm B&B, which they own, is better than any of their guests' establishments. However, they find that their close friendship is scrutinised even more than their property

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The White Swan Hotel in Yeadon, West Yorkshire, is the second stop of the competition, and owners Graham and Barbara Yellow hope their basic facilities and affordable prices will please their guests. Spiritual couple Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor get good vibes from their room, Rachel Lonergan views the hosts in a new light and breakfast is well received by the contestants, despite having to pay a supplement fee

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Vegetarians Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor host at the Old Mill House B&B in Bridport, Dorset, and both come under attack at dinner when Malcolm voices his opinions on meat eating. In the morning, a meditation session gets a mixed response, and most of the guests are left cold by the vegetarian buffet breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Rachel and Dan Lonergan welcome their guests to the Brighton Inn, East Sussex, where they hope to offer a luxury, boutique experience. Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor give their room a thorough inspection, before the groups learns the art of building a human pyramid in the afternoon's activity. At breakfast, they discover a lack of vegetarian alternatives, and the hosts suspect game-playing when they are shocked by some negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together to confront their rivals and find out how much they have been paid. Richard and Susan are keen to tackle the bathroom issues of Barbara and Graham, who bask in the comments from Malcolm and Fiona. The Old Mill House proprietors defend their vegetarian breakfast routine, but serve up snobby feedback to Rachel and Dan from the Brighton Inn

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Rothschild giraffe Orla is about to give birth to her second calf but is three weeks overdue. This episode captures the arrival of the giraffe family's youngest member and its introduction to the rest of the herd. Cameras also follow the Chester team as they attempt to save mountain chicken frogs from extinction, and there's a look at the secret world of three disruptive aardvarks

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Christine Attwood and Tony Congdon in Purley, Croydon, who need help deciding whether they should sell or upgrade their home. The pair have been going back and forth for almost a decade about the future of their unusual bungalow - Tony loves the property and its location, but Christine longs to move closer to the coast to enjoy her retirement

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Two-and-a-half years have passed since Dick and Angel Strawbridge swapped their flat in Southend for a 19th-century chateau in France costing only £280,000, and in that time, the pair have worked to transform the derelict property into a fairytale castle. However, around half of the 45 rooms are yet to receive adequate attention, the couple's fledgling events business demands attention, and the outbuildings are still in need of conversion

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows former blacksmith Alan Dawson, who has devised a way of building that should allow him to complete his home in just seven days. The method resembles that of a giant toy construction, with wiring, lighting, plumbing and carpets built into sections that are then taken to the site by lorry - but precision is critical if the house is to fit together

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode follows the stories of people who have lived through tragic, life-changing events, and explores how these individuals endure with the strength and support of their loved ones. An 86-year-old man is rushed to St Georges by paramedics after a suspected stroke, while an 80-year-old woman is seen by doctors after falling and sustaining an open fracture to her leg. On the paediatric ward, a mother has brought her 14-year-old daughter to see a doctor after she hurt her ankle during gymnastics

programme.title: Two Sisters, One Body
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story of two Omphalopagus twins. About to leave high school Carmen and Lupita have more than their grades or their rare conjoined condition to think about, they are Mexicans in President Donald Trump's America. Now is a key turning point in their life as their American dream threatens to come to an end

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy game show, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by comedians Katherine Ryan and Rob Beckett. Comedian Greg Davies is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.desc: A selection of previous investigations from the programme delving into the secrets behind mass-produced food. programme.desc: The presenter examines the social significance of cars in the 20th century. programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: Japan would create arguably the greatest fighter in the Second World War - the Mitsubishi Zero, but their failed War Factories would ultimately reduce the Zero to a Kamikaze plane

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: How the Lancaster factory, one of the biggest buildings in Europe at the time, helped to create a truly war-winning weapon

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: Long before Henry Ford, Samuel Colt is the true father of mass production. Ironically, it was the inadequacy of Soviet factory production which made the AK47 so effective

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The First World War led to a number of astounding war factories, which laid the foundations and paved the way for modern factories of today

programme.title: Mission: Kill Hitler
programme.desc: A plot to kill the fuhrer that remained secret until the late 1990s. Operation Foxley planned to murder Hitler during his daily morning walk at the Berghof, his Bavarian residence. Two soldiers parachuted into the area were supposed to find a perfect location to shoot Hitler and stop the devastating war. Based on the British Secret Services' declassified documents, using archives and fictionalised reconstitutions, this film recounts the full story and the detailed plan that should have led to the murder of Adolf Hitler, and explains why it failed.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: British-born actress Jane Seymour knows there is Jewish ancestry on her father's side of the family, but beyond that she knows very little, other than her own suspicions that they suffered in the Holocaust. As she researches her paternal great-aunts Jadwiga and Michaela, she soon finds out more about their experiences under Nazi occupation. programme.title: Forbidden History

programme.title: Mission: Kill Hitler
programme.desc: A plot to kill the fuhrer that remained secret until the late 1990s. Operation Foxley planned to murder Hitler during his daily morning walk at the Berghof, his Bavarian residence. Two soldiers parachuted into the area were supposed to find a perfect location to shoot Hitler and stop the devastating war. Based on the British Secret Services' declassified documents, using archives and fictionalised reconstitutions, this film recounts the full story and the detailed plan that should have led to the murder of Adolf Hitler, and explains why it failed.

The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzo's. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Rita's. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a year's worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: First Dates

However, she gets a little more than she bargained for when engineer Rhys reveals a rather intimate tattoo. Part-time fitness instructor and disco dancer Selvin meets Donna, who seeks a man who can make her laugh. Former Playboy bunny Kelly-Ann is a model who's dated some A-list stars in her time and wants 'a daring man' to keep her feeling alive. Will tattooed motorbike daredevil Stephen tickle her fancy?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The celebrated armchair critics share their critiques on shows including Ratched, Council House Britain, Family Fortunes, This Morning, Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites, First Dates and BBC News coverage of royal finances, students and the moment the Prime Minister appeared to be confused by his own rules

programme.title: John & Yoko: Above Us Only Sky
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon's album Imagine, released in 1971, exploring how the art, politics and music of the pair are intrinsically entwined. Featuring interviews with Yoko Ono, Julian Lennon, David Bailey, John Dunbar, Dan Richter and Eddie Veale, some of whom have never spoken publicly on film before, as well as previously unseen footage of Lennon and Ono from their private archive

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

programme.desc: IT expert and disco fanatic Joel Rowbottom throws the second of the week's parties in Wakefield, West Yorkshire, hoping to impress his guests with an exciting mixture of food and dance. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Shoeless window cleaner Jake Coxon hosts the fourth dinner party from Wakefield, West Yorkshire, hoping to impress his guests with beef Wellington, and performing his song God Is a Rocking Chair with his band the Sourheads

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
